title: Hungarians decide whether to end 16 years of Orbán rule and elect rival
description: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, but PM Viktor Orbán has been in a defiant mood.

title: Trump Was Watching a U.F.C. Fight in Miami While Iran Talks Collapsed
description: On his way to Florida, President Trump said it did not matter to him if a deal with Iran was reached or not: “We win, regardless,” he said.
categories: us and israeli attack on iran (2026)

title: What to Know as Hungary Votes in Elections Watched by the World
description: With Prime Minister Viktor Orban, a standard-bearer for global populism, in political peril, the vote on Sunday could have far-reaching implications.

title: Rory McIlroy Criticized for Remarks Ahead of Final Round at The Masters
description: Rory McIlroy drew criticism from fans following his comments ahead of Sunday’s final round at The Masters.

title: Phil Mickelson calls out Masters for course tweaks: ‘Longer isn’t always better’
description: Phil Mickelson was not a fan of these course changes.

title: Woman confessed to murdering mother, stepfather and dumping bodies in a ravine
description: A woman allegedly confessed to murdering her mother and stepfather with an accomplice and dumping their bodies in a ravine.
